message:
fix: dynamic_outcomes_equivalent reports true when only one DAG has fan-in

When a plan rewrite changes the fan-in structure (adds/removes shared
children), one DAG would be skipped (empty BTreeSet) while the other
executed normally. The OR-based comparison short-circuited to true,
masking the fact that no real comparison happened.

Fix: only report equivalence when both DAGs were executed and labels
match, or when both were skipped due to fan-in. When exactly one has
fan-in, the result is now correctly indeterminate (not ok).

Applies to both run_lab_dynamic_equivalence and run_e2e_pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
